channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Britain left the EU 10 years ago. Its politics has been an unruly mess
item.description: Brexit fractured the European Union, and broke British politics. A decade on, millions of voters have deserted the two big parties for alternatives.
item.content:encoded:
Brexit fractured the European Union, and broke British politics. A decade on, millions of voters have deserted the two big parties for alternatives.

(Image credit: Kirsty Wigglesworth)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: What to know about a cold storage warehouse fire in Los Angeles
item.description: Firefighters are still battling a blaze at a massive frozen-food storage facility near downtown Los Angeles six days after the fire started.
item.content:encoded:
Firefighters are still battling a blaze at a massive frozen-food storage facility near downtown Los Angeles six days after the fire started.

(Image credit: Jae C. Hong)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Authorities arrest 2 more suspects in planned attack on Trump's UFC show
item.description: Two more people in Missouri and Washington state have been arrested in connection with the planned attack. Law enforcement officials learned about the possible threat on June 10, four days before the event on the White House's South Lawn.
item.content:encoded:
Two more people in Missouri and Washington state have been arrested in connection with the planned attack. Law enforcement officials learned about the possible threat on June 10, four days before the event on the White House's South Lawn.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Gunman kills an officer at a Montreal hotel before being shot dead, police say
item.description: Police say a suspect armed with a long gun opened fire at a Montreal hotel, killing a police officer before officers returned fire, killing him.
item.content:encoded:
Police say a suspect armed with a long gun opened fire at a Montreal hotel, killing a police officer before officers returned fire, killing him.

(Image credit: Christopher Katsarov)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: A federal judge finds a Trump data system to verify voters is unlawful
item.description: Tens of millions of voters have had their data run through the Trump administration's revamped SAVE tool. A judge just found it unlawful.
item.content:encoded:
Tens of millions of voters have had their data run through the Trump administration's revamped SAVE tool. A judge just found it unlawful.

(Image credit: CJ Gunther)
item.dc:creator: Jude Joffe-Block

item.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Texas man's intellectual disability case in capital case
item.description: The court's action means Victor Saldaño is likely to be executed even though both defense and state experts determined he was not eligible for execution under the law.
item.content:encoded:
The court's action means Victor Saldaño is likely to be executed even though both defense and state experts determined he was not eligible for execution under the law.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Magnificent Messi makes history, breaks all-time World Cup scoring record
item.description: Messi scored a record-setting 17th World Cup goal in Argentina's game against Austria. And, then, he netted another goal, making him the all-time leader in World Cup tournaments (men and women).
item.content:encoded:
Messi scored a record-setting 17th World Cup goal in Argentina's game against Austria. And, then, he netted another goal, making him the all-time leader in World Cup tournaments (men and women).

(Image credit: Charlotte Wilson)
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: Laverne Cox wrote her memoir because 'one more human story out there can help'
item.description: For more than a decade, actor Laverne Cox been one of the most visible trans women in America. But the Orange Is the New Black star says she spent most of childhood keeping herself hidden.
item.content:encoded:
For more than a decade, actor Laverne Cox been one of the most visible trans women in America. But the Orange Is the New Black star says she spent most of childhood keeping herself hidden.

(Image credit: Dimitrios Kambouris)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: Clive Davis, music executive and champion of legendary pop artists, has died at 94
item.description: The record executive was instrumental in shepherding the successful careers of a number of monumental music stars, including Aretha Franklin, Bruce Springsteen, Janis Joplin, Billy Joel and Whitney Houston.
item.content:encoded:
The record executive was instrumental in shepherding the successful careers of a number of monumental music stars, including Aretha Franklin, Bruce Springsteen, Janis Joplin, Billy Joel and Whitney Houston.

(Image credit: Leon Bennett/Getty Images for The Recording A)
item.dc:creator: Andrew Flanagan

item.title: 2 students in custody after shooting at high school in Philippines kills 3
item.description: An investigation is underway to determine the cause. Police said the suspects claimed they were bullied at school.
item.content:encoded:
An investigation is underway to determine the cause. Police said the suspects claimed they were bullied at school.

(Image credit: James Daantos)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
